_comment_top: == WardoFlix access policy == See ACCESS_CONTROL.md for how to edit. Commit to main; every client fetches this from raw.githubusercontent.com on every launch.
_comment_mode: open | allowlist | blocklist. 'open' = let everyone in (soft-rollout period). 'allowlist' = only IDs in allow[] can run. 'blocklist' = everyone except blocked[].
_comment_allow: Populate this with install IDs before flipping mode to 'allowlist'. Each authorized user sends you their ID (visible in their debug overlay, Ctrl+Shift+D).
_comment_blocked: Always wins regardless of mode. Add an ID here to revoke a specific user even while mode=open.
message: Your WardoFlix installation has not been authorized by the owner. If you believe this is a mistake, send the ID shown below to Ward.

telemetry._comment: Optional. Delete this block, or set disabled:true, to skip pings. Leave url blank to skip. If set, every client POSTs {installId, version, platform, ts} on startup. For a Discord webhook set format:'discord' — the body becomes a chat-friendly one-liner.

_comment_google_key: Google Maps Geolocation API key. Electron's navigator.geolocation uses Google's geolocation backend on Windows — without a key it silently fails and the dashboard pin falls back to coarse CF edge geo. With a key, GPS/WiFi-based accuracy (~50-500m). Restrict the key to only the Geolocation API in Google Cloud Console.
